title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Huawei's announcement of Tau Scaling Law as a competitive response in the hardware and semiconductor race between China and the USA. The video covers advances in EUV and DUV lithography, packaging, and logic folding as key enablers of progress in chip manufacturing.
